basic_details.job_title: BEL Senior Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially released the Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 383/HR/REC/US/2026/ESM) for 1 vacancy at Bengaluru, Karnataka. Eligible diploma holders aged up to 50 years can apply offline up to 22 June 2026 via BEL Official Website. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly salary of ₹30,000 to ₹1,20,000.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 years Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics / Aeronautical / Mechatronics
qualification.details: 3 years Diploma in Engineering or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics / Aeronautical / Mechatronics

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (E-1 grade) (Drone Veteran) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
